text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, June 01. No work meetings today. You have neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place and Sarah wanting to work on her design course.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Putting together our grocery list. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Healthy choices are great. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Toddlers are full of energy. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Having dinner with our friends tonight. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've mapped the locations. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: The lawn mower is having issues starting. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Automations are great when they work. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Good way to wrap up the day. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I've indexed the research notes. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Great progress. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! I've got the grocery list ready. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Hosted a game night at our place. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Social breaks are great. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Checking on some house maintenance items. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Automations are great when they work. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Relaxation mode active. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! That is a clean implementation. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan's team played a match and won 3-2! Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. That's a big step. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
